hero-lede: Maybe picking what to read next feels like too much right now. That's okay. Let us choose the order for you. Each path takes you through things one step at a time, so you can relax and just learn. Pick the path that sounds most like you. And don't worry — you can change to another one whenever you want.

If picking what to read next feels like one decision too many, let us handle it for you. Each path is a gentle route that goes in order, so you can relax and learn at your own pace. Pick the one that sounds like you — and don't worry, you can switch any time you like.

beginner-desc: Could this path take you from "I'm a bit nervous about this" to "oh, I've got this"? There's one way to find out. You'll meet what AI is, why it matters, and how to take your very first steps with it. It's the perfect place to begin.
